MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-04-2007 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT SERGIO SOROKKO GALLERIES' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET #2) AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET #1 AND #2) IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO SERVE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PAY MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $525 WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-16-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-19-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories, Production Of Documents For Inspection And Copying And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-04-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant SERGIO SOROKKO GALLERIES' Motion to compel responses to special interrogatories (set #2) and request for production of documents (set #1 and #2) is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and to produce documents within 10 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff is ordered to pay monetary sanctions in the amount of $525 within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
